title: T-Cut Perfect Paint Rapid Scratch Remover, 500ml – Removes Swirl Marks, Paint Transfer & Scratches | No Harmful Residues or Silicones | Suitable for All Paint Types
features: REMOVES SWIRL MARKS AND LIGHT SCRATCHES: Specialised formula safely eliminates swirl marks, paint transfer, and light scratches from modern car paintwork
SILICONE-FREE AND RESIDUE-FREE: Contains no silicone, leaving no harmful residues and ensuring a clean, smooth surface
PREPARES FOR REPAINTING OR POLISHING: Rejuvenates the paintwork, making it ready for further polishing or repainting for a flawless finish
VERSATILE APPLICATION: Suitable for use on enamels, gloss painted surfaces, gel coats, and ceramics, making it perfect for various surfaces
FOR MAXIMUM PROTECTION: Achieve the best results by finishing with T-Cut Final Glaze, providing added protection and shine
description: From the manufacturer How to use: Shake the bottle and pour it onto a damp microfibre cloth. Shake the bottle well and apply sparingly onto a damp microfibre cloth. Work on a small area at a time and apply the product to the surface working in a circular motion.
